changes.motivation: A recent commit changed the CLI to use a dynamic random port for the OIDC callback listener instead of the fixed port 8250, but the Authentik OIDC provider still used strict matching on `http://localhost:8250/oidc/callback`, causing Authentik to reject all callback requests on any other port.
changes.summary: Changed the localhost redirect URI entry in `packages/infrastructure/authentik_vault_sso/main.tf` from `matching_mode = "strict"` with a hardcoded port 8250 URL to `matching_mode = "regex"` with the pattern `http://localhost:[0-9]+/oidc/callback`, allowing any dynamic port to be accepted. The `authentik_vault_sso` reference doc was auto-regenerated by a hook to reflect this change.

problems: The CLI was changed to use a dynamic random port for the OIDC callback, but the corresponding Authentik OIDC provider configuration (strict URL matching on port 8250) was not updated in the same commit, leaving the two components out of sync with no visible compile-time or plan-time error. A comment or cross-reference in either the CLI code or the Terraform module noting the coupling between the callback port and the Authentik redirect URI allowlist would have flagged this dependency.
